
  // Type_string
  public class Type_string {
    var type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    var stringn : String = ""
  }
  // Generic_string_type
  public class Generic_string_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type {
    // p_any_from_any
    override public func p_any_from_any(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Type_string = v_string_any_from_any(type_type, type_any)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_copy
    override public func p_copy(
      _ copyany : Vx_Core.Type_any,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let copyval : Type_string = v_string_from_any(copyany)
      let value : Type_string = v_string_copy(copyval, type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_new
    override public func p_new(
      _ type_type : Vx_Core.Type_type,
      _ type_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_string = f_string(type_anylist)
      let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
      return output
    }
    // p_shutdown
    override public func p_shutdown(
      _ type_any : Vx_Core.type_any
    ) {
      v_string_shutdown(v_string_from_any(type_any))
    }
    // p_type_type
    override public func p_type_type(
    ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
      return t_string
    }
  }
  // v_string_constructor
  public static func v_string_constructor(
  ) -> Type_string {
    Vx_Core.v_global_reserve()
    return Type_string()
  }
  // v_string_create
  public static func v_string_create(
  ) -> Type_string {
    var output : Type_string = v_string_constructor()
    v_string_startup(output)
    return output
  }
  // v_string_register
  public static func v_string_register(
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    v_string_startup_type()
    v_string_startup_empty()
    return t_string
  }
  // v_string_shutdown - mutating
  public static func v_string_shutdown(
    _ value : Type_string
  ) {
    let type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any = value.type_any
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.e_any
    if let generic_any : Generic_string_any = type_any.generic_any {
      generic_any.backref = nil
    }
    value.stringn = ""
  }
  // v_string_startup - mutating
  public static func v_string_startup(
    _ value : Type_string
  ) {
    let generic_any : Generic_string_any = Generic_string_any()
    generic_any.backref = value
    value.type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_new_from_type_generic_any(
      t_string,
      generic_any
    )
  }
  // v_string_startup_empty
  public static func v_string_startup_empty() {
    v_string_startup(e_string)
    Vx_Core.v_startup_e(
      t_string,
      e_string.type_any
    )
  }
  // v_string_startup_type
  public static func v_string_startup_type() -> Vx_Core.Type_type {
    let type_type = t_string
    type_type.p_name = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn("vx/core/string")
    type_type.p_extends = Vx_Core.e_string
    let generic_type : Vx_Core.Generic_type = Generic_string_type()
    Vx_Core.v_startup_t(
      type_type,
      generic_type
    )
    return type_type
  }
  // v_any_from_string
  public static func v_any_from_string(
    _ value : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    return value.type_any
  }
  // v_any_from_stringn
  public static func v_any_from_stringn(
    _ stringn : String
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_any {
    let value : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_from_stringn(stringn)
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_any = Vx_Core.v_any_from_string(value)
    return output
  }
  // v_string_from_any
  public static func v_string_from_any(
    _ type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.e_string
    if type_any.type_type === Vx_Core.t_string {
      output = unsafeBitCast(type_any.backref, to: Vx_Core.Type_string.self)
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_string_from_stringn
  public static func v_string_from_stringn(
    _ stringn : String
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_string = v_string_create()
    output.stringn = stringn
    return output
  }
  // v_stringn_from_string
  public static func v_stringn_from_string(
    _ type_string : Vx_Core.Type_string
  ) -> String {
    return type_string.stringn
  }
  // v_listany_from_liststring
  public static func v_listany_from_liststring(
    _ liststring : [Vx_Core.Type_string]
  ) -> [Vx_Core.Type_any] {
    var output : [Vx_Core.Type_any] = []
    for value : Vx_Core.Type_string in liststring {
      output.append(value.type_any)
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_liststring_from_listany
  public static func v_liststring_from_listany(
    _ listany : [Vx_Core.Type_any]
  ) -> [Vx_Core.Type_string] {
    var output : [Vx_Core.Type_string] = []
    for type_any : Vx_Core.Type_any in listany {
      let value : Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_from_any(type_any)
      if value !== Vx_Core.e_string {
        output.append(value)
      }
    }
    return output
  }
  // v_string_copy
  public static func v_string_copy(
    _ copyval : Vx_Core.Type_string,
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_string = copyval
    Vx_Core.v_reserve_listany(
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    let filter_anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist = Vx_Core.v_anylist_from_listtype_anylist(
      [Vx_Core.t_string],
      anylist
    )
    let msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      filter_anylist.type_any
    )
    var ischanged : Bool = false
    let orig_msgblock : Vx_Core.Type_msgblock = Vx_Core.v_msgblock_from_any(
      copyval.type_any
    )
    if msgblock !== orig_msgblock {
      ischanged = true
    }
    var stringn : String = ""
    if filter_anylist !== Vx_Core.e_anylist {
      let stringlist : Vx_Core.Type_stringlist = Vx_Core.v_stringlist_from_anylist(filter_anylist)
      let liststringn : [String] = Vx_Core.v_liststringn_from_liststring(stringlist.liststring)
      Vx_Core.v_release(stringlist.type_any)
      stringn = v_stringn_from_liststringn_joinn(liststringn, "")
    }
    if !ischanged {
      ischanged = stringn == copyval.stringn
    }
    var output : Vx_Core.Type_string = copyval
    if ischanged {
      let type_delta : Vx_Core.Type_delta = Vx_Core.v_delta_from_any(
        filter_anylist.type_any
      )
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_msgblock(msgblock)
      Vx_Core.v_reserve_delta(type_delta)
      output = Vx_Core.Type_string = Vx_Core.v_string_create()
      output.stringn = stringn
      output.type_any.type_msgblock = msgblock
      output.type_any.type_delta = type_delta
    }
    Vx_Core.v_release_except_listany(
      output.type_any,
      [
        copyval.type_any,
        anylist.type_any,
        filter_anylist.type_any
      ]
    )
    return output
  }
  // f_string
  public static func f_string(
    _ anylist : Vx_Core.Type_anylist
  ) -> Vx_Core.Type_string {
    let output : Vx_Core.Type_string = v_string_copy(e_string, anylist)
    return output
  }
  public static let t_string : Vx_Core.Type_type = Vx_Core.v_type_constructor()
  public static let e_string : Type_string = v_string_constructor()
